mapper.select: with claim_candidates as ( select top (#{limit}) t.id from infection_event_task t with (updlock, readpast, rowlock) where t.task_type = #{taskType} and t.status in ('PENDING', 'FAILED') and t.available_at <= #{now} and t.attempt_count < t.max_attempts order by t.priority asc, t.available_at asc, t.create_time asc, t.id asc ) update t set t.status = 'RUNNING', t.last_start_time = #{now}, t.update_time = #{now}, t.attempt_count = t.attempt_count + 1 output inserted.id, inserted.task_type, inserted.status, inserted.reqno, inserted.patient_raw_data_id, inserted.data_date, inserted.raw_data_last_time, inserted.source_batch_time, inserted.changed_types, inserted.trigger_reason_codes, inserted.priority, inserted.merge_key, inserted.first_triggered_at, inserted.last_event_at, inserted.debounce_until, inserted.trigger_priority, inserted.event_pool_version_at_enqueue, inserted.attempt_count, inserted.max_attempts, inserted.available_at, inserted.last_start_time, inserted.last_finish_time, inserted.last_error_message, inserted.create_time, inserted.update_time from infection_event_task t inner join claim_candidates c on c.id = t.id
